This is a very helpful and easy-to-use Privacy Policy Generator. It saved me a lot of time while creating a privacy policy for my application. The interface is simple, and the generated policy is clear and professional.

Thank you to the developer for providing this tool for free and maintaining it for the community. I really appreciate the effort. Highly recommended for developers who need a quick and reliable privacy policy generator.

author: CorbinGrosso
body: I'm currently a college student, and for my final class for my Associate's degree, I decided to make a mobile game. While working on publishing it on the Google Play Store, I found out that officially publishing it in such a way would require a Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, both of which the Play Store recommends I consult my legal advisor for (scary!). But then I stumbled across your privacy policy generator, and it is incredibly easy to use and absolutely a life-saver! Thank you for making such a straightforward tool! And especially being able to generate it as html made it perfect to use.

@odonc I built it from scratch. You can check the commit history 😄 It is small side project which I built it very quickly at the time, when Google made the privacy policy mandatory.

author: odonc
body: Great work! I just bought you a cup of ☕. Just curious, did you make the website from scratch or with a builder?

author: nisrulz
body:
Hi @nisrulz thanks for policy generator. Will you please add e-commerce policies like refund and cancellation policies.

Please open a separate issue for your questions. This issue is for a different purpose. Thank you 🙏🏼
